title: Senior Product Designer
summary: Lead product design across multiple client engagements — from research and IA to high-fidelity UI and design systems.
responsibilities: Drive design from research and discovery through to handoff
Build and maintain design systems for client products
Collaborate closely with engineers throughout implementation
Run user research and usability testing
Mentor designers and elevate the team's craft
requirements: 5+ years designing complex SaaS or enterprise software
A portfolio that shows clarity of thought and craft
Mastery of Figma; comfort with prototyping tools
Familiarity with AI-product design patterns a strong plus
